commit.subject: LU-19202 llite: remove no-op functions
commit.message:
LU-19202 llite: remove no-op functions

* remove some unused enumerations.
* remove empty functions
  ll_set_inode_lock_owner/ll_clear_inode_lock_owner
* replace unnecessary wrap functions ll_inode_lock/ll_inode_unlock

Signed-off-by: Bobi Jam <bobijam@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I63de53cd4e018b96f57dd0489aaeb286f267bbdf
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62025
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@dilger.ca>
Reviewed-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
